opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I can't breathe through my nose at all, and the congestion is making me panic every time I try to lie down.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The blockage and a constant dry cough are stopping me sleeping and making me anxious — I want to make sure my chest is okay.

symptom_narrative.onset: 3 days ago with a scratchy throat and feeling off
symptom_narrative.duration: congestion worst in the last 12 hours
symptom_narrative.character: blocked nose, was runny and clear, now stuffed up; dry tickly cough
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: nose completely blocked, very frustrating, can't sleep
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much; saline spray barely helped
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: sneezing earlier, felt feverish during the day; no chest pain, no coughing up phlegm

objective_data_offered.value: mouth-breathing constantly, but speaking in full sentences on video
no chest pain, not coughing up phlegm, breathing not laboured
